Our Programs

Learning Through Play & Joy

Age-appropriate programs designed to nurture curiosity, creativity, and confidence in every child.

🐣

Play Group

1.5 – 2.5 Years

A gentle introduction to structured play, social interaction, and early sensory exploration in a warm, safe setting.

🌱

Nursery

2.5 – 3.5 Years

Building early language, motor skills, and curiosity through fun activities, rhymes, and creative arts.

🌟

Pre-KG

3.5 – 4.5 Years

Developing school readiness with structured learning, early literacy, numeracy, and exciting activities.

🚀

Kindergarten

4.5 – 5.5 Years

A holistic curriculum combining academics, arts, sports, and character building to prepare confident learners.

🌈
A Second Home
Warm & nurturing environment
Why SARVALAYA?

More Than Just A School

Parents trust us because we treat every child as our own — with patience, love, and expert guidance.

🎓

Experienced & Caring Teachers

Well-trained educators who respond promptly to queries and go beyond expectations in kindness.

🧩

Unique Teaching Methods

Learning through play — worksheets, activities, and competitions that make children think beyond textbooks.

👶

Individual Attention

Tailored curriculum meeting each child's needs so every child feels valued and reaches their full potential.

🏆

Rich Cultural Activities

Celebrations, competitions, and events that build confidence, discipline, and a love for learning.
